questions.title: Clinical Assessment - Abdominal Pain
questions.question_text: What are the key observations you would monitor for a patient with abdominal pain?
expected_points: Assess abdominal pain using appropriate assessment tools
Monitor vital signs and observations specific to abdominal pain
Implement evidence-based interventions for abdominal pain
Document findings and care provided
Escalate concerns appropriately in amu setting
